title: Regional Studies — eight place-based analytical pages (Africa, Berlin, East Asia, London, Mideast, Mongol, Russia, Western)
public_claim: A regional-studies index that organizes place-based pages as analytical workbenches rather than travelogue or topic summaries.
distinctive_mechanism: It separates each regional page by case scope, source spine, historical inheritance, security relevance, and remaining verification work, with Russia Desk treated as the deepest current model.
